query:
SELECT id, status, startedAt, completedAt
FROM pipelineRuns 
ORDER BY completedAt DESC 
LIMIT 3;

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_projects,
  MAX(updatedAt) as most_recent_update,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hot,
  SUM(CASE WHEN priority = 'warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as warm
FROM projects
WHERE suppressed = 0 OR suppressed IS NULL;
